commands.review_summary:
The PR updates the macOS exec approval prompt and Control UI approval modal to render only the decisions allowed by the approval request, with focused Swift and UI tests.

PR surface: Source +41, Tests +42, Other +48. Total +131 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main computes `[allow-once, deny]` for `ask: always`, while the current macOS and Control UI prompts still render durable `allow-always`.
commands.review_followup: The protected `maintainer` label and MEMBER-authored PR require normal maintainer handling; no narrow automated repair is identified.

target.title: fix(exec): hide unavailable durable approval actions
target.body:
## Summary
- hide durable `Always Allow` in the macOS native exec approval prompt when the effective ask policy is `always`
- pass `allowedDecisions` through the Control UI approval parser and render only allowed dashboard actions
- keep durable approvals available for `on-miss` approvals and legacy payloads that do not include an allowed decision list

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/controllers/exec-approval.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/exec-approval.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/exec-approval.browser.test.ts`
- `cd apps/macos && swift test --filter ExecApprovalPromptLayoutTests`
- `git diff --check`
- Rebuilt BAD and GOOD mac apps from current `origin/main` base `4beadbf951` with real signing identity `jessesCert`

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: `Ask mode: always` approvals no longer offer durable `Always Allow` in the native macOS prompt or the Control UI approval modal.
Real environment tested: local macOS A/B apps, signed with `jessesCert`; BAD from current `main`, GOOD from this PR.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: triggered `system.run` for `/bin/sh -lc pwd` through the local Gateway/native app approval path.
Evidence after fix: BAD showed `Allow Once`, `Always Allow`, and `Don't Allow`; GOOD showed only `Don't Allow` and `Allow Once` in the native prompt. Focused Control UI tests prove `allowedDecisions: ["allow-once", "deny"]` renders only `Allow once` and `Deny`.
Observed result after fix: GOOD no longer exposes durable approval for `ask: always`.
What was not tested: broad full-suite CI; queued GitHub checks will cover the rest.
target.author: jesse-merhi
